feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to get all system status assigned to any application like equipment, Functional Location etc.
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

How can we get all system status assigned to any Application like Equipment, Functional Location, Notification, maintenance order etc.

entry.title: Availability check on MO with open OBD
entry.content:
Available qty: 2 EA

MO requirement qty: 2 EA

When the MO is created, the ATP commits the MO line with the available qty.

Once Outbound delivery is created for the MO, the material is allocated to OBD. ATP availablity check decommits the MO line.

entry.title: Need Assistance – Auto Unrelease PO on Any Change
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

My requirement is that if any changes are made to a released Purchase Order (PO), it should be automatically unreleased. This should apply to all types of changes, including modifications to the header text and line-item text.

I have identified the following USER EXIT for this requirement. Could you please confirm whether it will work or suggest an alternative if needed?

 Use User Exit (EXIT_SAPMM06E_013)

  1. Inside this enhancement, use the exit: EXIT_SAPMM06E_013
    • If the PO is released by looking at im_ekko-frgke. If the status equals 'G', it indicates the PO is released
    • If header text is modified (EKKO- TDLINE).
    • If change is detected (i.e. the texts differ), reset the release flag by setting EKKO-FRGKE to 'R' (or any value that represents an unreleased state).
    • Change should automatically “unrelease” the PO at all levels
  2. How to find the TDLINE main point. So that I below mentioned the explain & use the function module for read the text.
    • ID=F01
    • LANGUAGE=EN
    • NAME= 410000102400010  (PO NUMBER & ADD 00010)
    • OBJECT NAME=EKPO

 

 

                        

    If TDLINE can be changed the po automatically unrelease all levels.

The new header text (new_txt, assumed to be provided in im_ekko-tdline) is compared with the fetched text (old_txt).

MM (Materials Management) PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) MAN Material Requirements Planning

entry.title: Restricting Duplicate Notifications for Same Equipment
entry.content:
If a notification is created, first check whether a previous notification exists for the same equipment. If an open notification already exists, restrict the creation of a new one notification.

To implement this logic, I have tried using a user exit with the procedure mentioned below. Can you suggest whether this logic will work smoothly?"

User Exit and Logic for Restriction

In the QQMA0002 & QQMA0026   user exit you will use the VIQMEL table to query existing notifications and restrict new ones based on equipment.

User Exit: (QQMA0002 & QQMA0026):

Steps to Implement the Restriction Logic:

  1. Query the VIQMEL table
    • Use VIQMEL-EQUNR (Equipment Number) to find existing notifications.
    • Filter by QMART (Notification Type) is necessary.
    • Retrieve OBJNR (Object Number) from the result.
  2. Check Status in JEST Table
    • Use OBJNR to fetch the status from JEST table.
    • Filter with INACT field:
      • If INACT is blank (Active) → Restrict notification creation.
      • If INACT is 'X' (Inactive) → Allow creation.
  3. Prevent Notification Creation
    • If restriction applies, use MESSAGE statement to show an error message.

                                                     ⬇️ 

             Already have created same equipment Notification

 

Logic Description (Step-by-Step):

  1. Find Existing 'M2' Notifications: Retrieve all notifications from the VIQMEL table where EQUNR matches the equipment number and QMART is 'M2'.
  2. Check Status (JEST): For each notification found in step 1, retrieve the corresponding status from the JEST table using the OBJNR.
  3. Determine Activity: For each JEST entry:
    • If INACT is blank (space), the notification is considered active.
    • If INACT is 'X', the notification is considered inactive.
  4. Apply Restriction:
    • If at least one active 'M2' notification is found in step 3, prevent the creation of the new 'M2' notification and display an error message.
    • If all existing 'M2' notifications are inactive (INACT = 'X') or no 'M2' notifications exist (step 1 returned no results), allow the creation of the new 'M2' notification.

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP Asset Performance Management MM (Materials Management)

entry.title: Error "Serial number already exists for material" when creating new equipment
entry.content:
Hello, 

We are working on a scenario where fresh material is received with an external serial number successfully in stock. 

Then I'm trying to create a new equipment and assign the received material with the external number to it, but it returns an error - "Serial number already exists for material" 

Is there a way to assign already received material with serial number to new equipment?

entry.title: Installation of equipment to functional location via maintenance order possibility
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have a request if there is a possibility to perform an installation of equipment to functional location via corrective maintenance order? 

There is an equipment created with assigned serialized material and successful installation can be performed with IE4N or the respective Fiori app, however i`m trying to perform it via corrective maintenance order and looking for relevant information for it. 

 

Thank you

entry.title: How to get measurement readings recorded correctly when using PM notification
entry.content:
The measuring points at the equipment gets updated from parent measurement points at the functional location.

When trying to update an equipment measurement reading using IK11, I get an error message saying that "Transfer of measurement values are defined for measurement point xxxx". Which is as I expect.

When I use a PM notification IW21/IW22, and want to fill in measurement readings by going to menu Extras >MeasDocuments and then select "All Measuring Points on Object", I get only the ones from the equipment. I can then update the measuring point, but the reading will not be updated back to the measuring point at the functional location. 

I want to be able to record readings at the functional location level, or as a minimum to get the same error message as when using IK11.

How do I obtain this?

entry.title: Time Stamp in PM Notification - Name of the notification originator not shown.
entry.content: In the notification long text, I would like name of the originator display with the time stamp. Current it's not showing on my display.

entry.title: Fehler beim Sichern von IH-Aufträgen mit OCI-Schnittstelle (DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR)
entry.content:
Hallo zusammen,

wir haben ein Problem beim Sichern von IH-Aufträgen. Der Fehler "DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR" tritt auf, sobald wir Komponenten in die Positionsliste des Auftrags einfügen. Dabei spielt es keine Rolle, ob es sich um Komponenten aus unserem OCI-Katalog handelt oder um reguläre SAP-Materialien. Auch nach der Freigabe des Auftrags können wir ihn nicht sichern.

Zunächst wird angezeigt, dass der Auftrag freigegeben wurde. Kehren wir dann jedoch zum SAP-Menü zurück, erscheint die genannte Fehlermeldung.

Das Sichern von Aufträgen ohne neu eingefügte Komponenten funktioniert problemlos.

Hat jemand eine Idee, woran das liegen könnte? Vielen Dank im Voraus für eure Hilfe!

entry.title: How to include Project System in Make-to-Stock process in Public cloud system?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I am currently working with a client who wishes to integrate Project System into the Make-to-Stock process. As I have not yet had experience with this specific scenario, I would greatly appreciate your guidance on the process.

Your insights and support would be extremely valuable to me.

Thank you in advance for your help.

Best regards,
Souhardhya Sen

entry.title: How to get spare part list assigned to equipment BOM
entry.content:
hello everyone,

how to write logic to get spare part list which is assigned in equipment BOM.

entry.title: SAP S/4 Out-of-the-Box Functionality in Plant Maintenance and EHS – Std. Features vs. Add-On Licens.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am currently exploring SAP S/4HANA and would like to understand the out-of-the-box (standard) functionalities available in the Plant Maintenance (PM) and Environment, Health & Safety (EHS) modules, without requiring any additional licensing or add-ons cost. 

Specifically, I would like to know:

  1. Work Clearance Management (WCM) & Permit to Work – Are these included as standard features in SAP S/4HANA, or do they require a separate license?
  2. Standard EHS Functionalities – What key capabilities are provided by default for incident management, risk assessment, and compliance tracking?
  3. SAP Plant Maintenance (PM) Features – Which functionalities are pre-configured in areas like work order management, preventive maintenance, and resource scheduling?
  4. Integration & Enhancements – How does SAP S/4HANA handle cross-module integration (e.g., EHS & PM) without additional costs, and what enhancements are available within the standard system

entry.title: Table to find PR created from Ariba
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Can you please let me know the table to find PR created from Ariba

Thanks & Regards, 

Preethi Alevarthi

entry.title: Difference between Assignment of People and Assignment of Person responsible. ( RSH )
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

With the new 43R(RSH), users can assign people through the Maintenance Scheduling Board (F2603). After assignments are made and operations dispatched, these assignments do not appear in the Person Responsible tab of the Maintenance Order or in Perform Maintenance Job (ready to perform). To have the assignments reflected, users need to open the 'Assign Maintenance Order Operation' app (F3423) and manually assign a person responsible, or the technician has to self-assign using Perform Maintenance Job.

Question: What is the purpose of having an assignment option in the Maintenance Scheduling Board (F2603)?

Thanks,

R

entry.title: Maintenance plans with status "Scheduled Save to call "
entry.content:
Hi, how i can identify the maintenance plans with status "Scheduled Save to call "

Regards

entry.title: Guidance to configure PM Notification status for users to un-approve notifications after approval
entry.content:
Please I need guidance to configure PM Notification User status for users to un-approve notifications after approval. 

Once a notification has been approved, our planners on occasion need to un-approve to allow them to send back to initiator so they can make improvements and learn how to make a quality notifications.

entry.title: SAP PM Certification is retired, what to do because certification expires 31 March 2025
entry.content:
Good day all,

SAP PM Certification is retired, what to do because certification expires 31 March 2025

entry.title: Export download Issue - Find Technical Objects or Find Maintenance Orders
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Unlike ECC , S4 HANA Apps are not providing download of selected objects using export options ?

ECC Screen : Selected Item 8 , Output download 8 Items.

 

SAP S/4 HANA Fiori : Export download all objects 

Is there any workaround ? so Business can download selective data ?

BR.

R

entry.title: No Planning Tab in Display Maintenance Order Screen : SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content: No Planning Tab in Display Maintenance Order Screen : This is an issue for End User /business to view Planning data such as Maintenance Plan, Maintenance Item and Last Work Order created for Individual WO via Display Work Order app. What is alternative option offered by SAP in this case ?

entry.title: fleet management enhancement in Tcode IFCU
entry.content: I want to do the screen enhancement on transaction code IFCU screen to add the filed for external fleet of type p. However, i couldn't find any screen enhancement for it.
